title: skimmia laureola subsp. multinervia
intro: Skimmia laureola subsp. multinervia, also known as Chinese Skimmia or Green Tea Plant, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to China and Taiwan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Skimmia laureola subsp. multinervia include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Skimmia laureola subsp. multinervia is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to support digestive health and reduce stress.
